title: Solendara
description:
Solendara is an enigmatic hack-and-slash style action RPG where ancient mythology, sacred magic, and a modern civilization built around Soleianity quietly collide.

Marie, a young sister of Soleianity, is sent to a remote frontier far from the Central Church after her elder sister's demotion. There, amid forgotten ruins and traces of an age no scripture fully records, she begins what should have been a simple investigation.

But the relics buried in the borderlands do not sleep in silence.

As Marie explores ancient sites, strange powers awaken, sealed mechanisms stir, and fragments of a hidden history begin to surface. What first appears to be an isolated incident gradually leads her toward a conspiracy concealed beneath the faith, the church, and even the myths that shaped the world.

The light of Soleia has long been worshipped as salvation.
Yet wherever light falls, shadows gather.

Guided by uncertain allies, pursued by those who should have stood on the same side, and drawn toward truths never meant to be uncovered, Marie’s journey soon turns in a direction no one could have foreseen.

What lies beyond the ruins is not merely the past.
It is the beginning of a forgotten law, waiting to awaken once more.
description_short: Enigmatic Hack and slash style Action RPG where ancient mythology and magic blend with modern civilization~A story that reveals the forbidden, the desires, and the secrets of the world~
